svg.title: WPU Architecture Schematic
svg.desc: A World Processing Unit schematic showing world-state input, state memory, propagation scheduling, sparse propagation, dense recompute fallback, branching, rollout, hierarchical memory, and key WPU properties.
svg.text: World Processing Unit / World-State Processing Unit
detect changed objects and initialize affected set
WPU updates and simulates explicit world state rather than processing token sequences.
